summary.key_theme: 受惠於 AI 基礎設施需求強勁、與 Dell 等企業合作擴張以及市場對軟體產業信心回升，Palantir 股價表現強勢。

bullish.title: Why Palantir Technologies (PLTR) Is Up 17.4% After Cavanagh Extends Foundry And Becomes Channel Partner
bullish.reason: Thomas Cavanagh Construction Limited 延長 Foundry 合作並成為通路合作夥伴，直接帶動股價大幅上漲 17.4 %，顯示其商業模式擴張成功。

bullish.title: Why Is Palantir Technologies Stock Trending Higher On Monday? — PLTR stock climbs on Monday amid massive tech tailwinds and an on-premises AI operating system deal with Dell.
bullish.reason: 與 Dell 達成地端 AI 作業系統合作協議，結合科技產業順風，為公司帶來實質營收增長預期。

bullish.title: Palantir Stock Is Having Its Best Day in a Year. Software Looks Like a Buy Again.
bullish.reason: Snowflake 財報表現優異帶動整體軟體類股信心，Palantir 作為 AI 軟體指標股受惠明顯。

bullish.title: Does Palantir Technologies (PLTR) Have the Potential to Rally 35.91% as Wall Street Analysts Expect?
bullish.reason: 華爾街分析師平均目標價顯示有 35.9 % 的潛在上漲空間，反映市場對其長期成長潛力的共識。

bullish.title: Palantir's AI Infrastructure Momentum: Is PLTR Stock Still a Buy?
bullish.reason: 強調公司在 AI 基礎設施的定位與獲利能力持續增強，為股價提供基本面支撐。

bearish.title: Billionaire Peter Thiel moves out of U.S. citing harsh concerns
bearish.reason: 共同創辦人 Peter Thiel 移居國外，雖與公司營運無直接關聯，但可能引發市場對其與美國政府合約關係的聯想。

bearish.title: Palantir Technologies Inc. (PLTR): Renaissance Technologies Continues Trimming Stake
bearish.reason: 知名避險基金 Renaissance Technologies 持續減持股份，顯示部分大型機構對其估值採取獲利了結態度。

bearish.title: Palantir Vatican AI Clash Puts Defense Focus And Investor Risks In Focus
bearish.reason: 關於 AI 倫理的爭議可能增加公司在國防合約上的公關風險與監管壓力。

neutral.title: Palantir Technologies Inc. (PLTR) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
neutral.reason: 僅為 Zacks.com 用戶關注度報告，未提供具體財務或營運變動資訊。

neutral.title: Jim Cramer on Palantir: “Maybe It’s Coming Back”
neutral.reason: Jim Cramer 的評論屬於市場情緒觀察，對股價無直接基本面影響。

neutral.title: Final Trade: BA, JETS, PLTR, CLF
neutral.reason: 電視節目中的短線交易討論，缺乏深度分析，對長期股價影響有限。
